sn10.4:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was staying among the Magadhans at the Jewel-stand Shrine, the haunt of the yakkha-spirit, Maṇibhadda [Auspicious Jewel].
sn10.4:1.2: Then Maṇibhadda the yakkha-spirit went to the Blessed One and, on arrival, recited this verse:
sn10.4:2.1: “It’s always auspicious for one who is mindful.
sn10.4:2.3: The mindful one grows better each day
sn10.4:2.4: and is totally freed from animosity.”
sn10.4:3.1: The Buddha: “It’s always auspicious for one who is mindful.
sn10.4:3.2: The mindful one prospers happily always.
sn10.4:3.3: The mindful one grows better each day
sn10.4:3.4: but isn’t totally freed from animosity.
sn10.4:4.1: Whoever’s heart, all day, all night,
sn10.4:4.4: has no animosity with anyone at all.
